creator: avg@icyb.net.ua
text:
Sorry for this delay with this PR; RealLife, you know.

Denis, thank you very much for this patch! I like all the changes and
would like another o be added: USE_GNUSTEP_GUI can be removed from the
port Makefile and SDL/main.m should be patched to not include/import
AppKit/NSApplication.h at the same time.

Denis, could you create an updated patch to include this ?

A note to a committer: the following two port files are actually removed
by this update:
files/patch-JoystickHandler.h
files/patch-MyOpenGLView.h

-- 
Andriy Gapon
